citation.description: test_t8_routing_excludes_plain_typed_data_plans parametrizes over plans with plain dataclasses, enums, value objects, and deterministic CLI adapters; asserts T8 is absent from the agent criteria set (i.e. abstains).

criteria.criterion: A fixture plan defining only plain dataclasses/enums + a deterministic CLI adapter (no LLM surface) yields ZERO T8 findings. PROVE: an eval/unit over the fixture asserts T8 abstains (not-applicable).

citation.description: Applicability narrowed to 'schemas/enums consumed or emitted by an LLM/tool structured-output contract'. ANTI-FP note added: 'ordinary dataclasses, value objects, standard-library enums, and deterministic CLI adapters/readers remain under the non-overlay criteria; their data-shape gaps do not activate T8.'

criteria.criterion: The T8 applicability-gate wording in plan_review_T8.md is narrowed to LLM-consumed/emitted schemas/enums, with an explicit ANTI-FP note ('a plain dataclass / value object / stdlib Enum used by deterministic code is NOT in scope').

citation.description: test_t8_metric_adapter_regression_routes_real_gap_to_e2 uses an explicit fixture with AnalyzerResult, jscpd, Unavailable(reason, accruing_since), git metric readers, module_size_trend, and stdlib Status enum; asserts 'T8' not in agent criteria and 'E2' in single criteria. Also verifies E2.md routing language.

criteria.criterion: A regression fixture derived from 3ba0/0734 (metric adapter + migration) does not draw a T8 block.

citation.description: E2.md now explicitly assigns missing field provenance ('A referenced output field or sentinel value with no stated source/provenance') and computation/aggregation protocol gaps to E2, adding 'route them here, not through an LLM overlay'. Tested in test_t8_metric_adapter_regression_routes_real_gap_to_e2 (lines 595-601) which asserts E2 is in the single criteria and verifies the routing language in the rubric.

criteria.criterion: Any genuine spec gap the old T8 findings named (e.g. accruing_since source) still surfaces — but under a non-overlay criterion, correctly labeled.
